revision.comment: genesis.
revision.text:
{| class="infobox" style="text-align:center; font-size: 85%;" |+ '''[[Kyoto School|The Kyoto School of Philosophy]]''' |- |[[Image:Manpukuji_temple.jpg|175px|center]] |- |style="text-align:center"|''[[Kyoto University|…at Kyoto University.]]'' |- !Topics |- | [[Pure Land Buddhism|Shinran Buddhism]]
[[Logic of Basho]] • [[Nothingness#philosophy|Nothingness]] • [[Zen]]
[[Mu (negative)|Mu]] • [[Kenosis]] • [[Metanoetics]] • [[Sunyata]]
[[Interfaith dialogue]]
|- !Individuals |- | [[D.T. Suzuki]] • [[Tanabe Hajime]]
[[Abe Masao]] • [[Nishitani Keiji]]
[[Hisamatsu Shinichi|H. Shin'ichi]] • [[Nishida Kitaro]]
|- !Historical background |- | [[Meiji Restoration]] • [[Japanese nationalism|Nationalism & WW II]]
[[Occupied Japan]] • [[Post-occupation Japan|Post-occupation]]
|}

revision.comment: Bot: lowercase wikilinks to uppercase sections
revision.text:
{| class="infobox" style="text-align:center; font-size: 85%;" |+ '''[[Kyoto School|The Kyoto School of Philosophy]]''' |- |style="text-align:center"|''[[Kyoto University|…at Kyoto University.]]'' |- !Topics |- | [[Pure Land Buddhism|Shinran Buddhism]]

{{sidebar | name = Kyoto School | title = [[Kyoto School|The Kyoto School of Philosophy]] | titlestyle = font-size:110% | above = [[Kyoto University|at Kyoto University]] | bodyclass = hlist

Suzuki]] * [[Tanabe Hajime]] * [[Abe Masao]] * [[Nishitani Keiji]] * [[Hisamatsu Shinichi|H. Shin'ichi]] * [[Nishida Kitaro]]
| heading3 = Historical background | content3 = * [[Meiji Restoration]] * [[Japanese nationalism|Nationalism & WW II]] * [[Occupation of Japan]] * [[Post-occupation Japan|Post-occupation]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Philosophy templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Kyoto School | title = [[:en:Kyoto School|The Kyoto School of Philosophy]] | titlestyle = font-size:110% | above = [[Kyoto University|at Kyoto University]] | bodyclass = hlist
| heading1 = Topics | content1 = * [[Pure Land Buddhism|Shin Buddhism]] * [[Logic of basho]] * [[Nothingness#Philosophy|Nothingness]] * [[Zen]] * [[Mu (negative)|Mu]] * [[:en:kenosis|kenosis]] * [[Metanoetics]] * [[Sunyata]] * [[:en:Interfaith dialogue|Interfaith dialogue]] * | heading2 = Individuals | content2 = * [[:en:Kitaro Nishida|Nishida Kitarō]] * [[:en:Hajime Tanabe|Tanabe Hajime]] * [[Shūzō Kuki|Kuki Shūzō]] * [[Tetsuro Watsuji|Watsuji Tetsurō]] * [[:en:Kiyoshi Miki|Miki Kiyoshi]] * [[:en:Keiji Nishitani|Nishitani Keiji]] * [[Shin'ichi Hisamatsu|Hisamatsu Shin’ichi]] * [[Masao Abe|Abe Maso]] * [[:en:D. T. Suzuki|Suzuki Daisetsu]]
| heading3 = Historical background | content3 = * [[Meiji Restoration]] * [[:en:Japanese nationalism|Nationalism and WW II]] * [[Occupation of Japan]] * [[Post-occupation Japan|Post-occupation]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Philosophy and thinking sidebar templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
